examples: He attributed the party's lack of success to an overemphasis on ideology and ideas.
We must not respond to an overemphasis on divine love by denying that God is love.
Paradoxically, Africa's food problems are often ascribed to an overemphasis on nonfood drops.
The usual culprits are to blame: overemphasis on testing, cut backs to music and arts programs.
But by the 1970s, spectators had become turned off by an overemphasis on theatrics.
